calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR / Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Change Of Gender And Issuance Of New Birth Certificate
Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate..
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
Petitioner: Tadhg Coffey, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender of Tadhg Coffey from Female to Male, and the new birth certificate shall be issued reflecting the changes of Gender granted.
Decree signed in open court.
